---
title: "R Operators"
description: |
  R basic Operators 기초 연산자
categories:
  - r
author:
  - name: Bohak Maeng
    url: https://manboha.github.io
date: 06-30-2019
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Arithmetic Operators

```{r echo=TRUE}
8 + 3
8 - 3
8 * 2
8 / 2
8 ^ 2
10 %% 3   # 나머지 Remainder
10 %/% 3  # 몫 Quotient
(5/9) * (100-32)
```

## Logical Operators

```{r echo=TRUE}
5 == 5  # 같다
5 != 5  # 같지 않다
5 > 5  # 크다
5 >= 5  # 크거나 같다
3 < 5  # 작다
6 <= 5  # 작거나 같다
```
```{r echo=TRUE}
x <- TRUE
y <- FALSE
!x  # Not x
x | y  # x OR y
x & y  # x AND y
isTRUE(x)  # if x is TRUE
```
